center.name: Isidore Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire
center.summary: Isidore Geoffroy Saint-Hilaire是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Scale-throated earthcreeper，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scale-throated earthcreeper (Upucerthia dumetaria) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Peru, and possibly Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The scale-throated earthcreeper (Upucerthia dumetaria) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Peru, and possibly Uruguay.Remsen, J
